rules.example: *He wonders if the User is lying.*
The User reaches for the glass.

rules.format: Use [BRACKETS] for UI/System alerts or stat changes
Use standard prose with sensory detail
rules.example: The room smells of ozone and aged paper. Dim light filters through iron grating.

dialogue_formatting.comprehensive_example: Vex narrows his eyes. 'I don't recognize your face,' he says, while *wondering if he should pull his blaster.* The User remains silent, hand hovering near their belt. [ALERT] Vex is evaluating your threat level. [NPC STATE] Vex: Suspicious (rep: -15).
